pages.text:
Note No. 87/2011

FR/FRG/3

Embassy of the Kingdom of Lostha

Kurfürstenstraße 84 • 10787 Berlin

Federal Republic of Germany elefon: 030. 25 75 72 O • Fax: 030. 25 75 72 2

Mail: embleso@yahoo.cor

AMBAS ARE FRANCE

28, 0KT. 2011

COURRIER ARRIVEE

NOTE VERBALE

The Embassy of the Kingdom of Lesotho presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the French Republic and has the honour to announce that the

Government of the Kingdom of Lesotho has decided to adhere to the Convention relating to international Expositions of 22 November 1928 and to the Protocols of 16 November 1966 and 30 November 1972 and to the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988. It is on this basis that the Government of Lesotho wishes to inform that it has arrived at a decision to become a member of the Bureau of

International Expositions.

The Embassy of the Kingdom of Lesotho avails itself of this opportunity to convey to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs the renewed assurance of its highest consideration.

Berlin - 26 October, 2011

To: Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Republic of France

BERLIN
